title: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm

references.description: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
Security of processing when personal data is protected with a broken or risky cryptographic algorithm.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: Encryption and cryptography policies prohibiting the use of broken or risky cryptographic algorithms.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2

references.description: Use of cryptography controls requiring approved and strong cryptographic algorithms.
